channel.title: Unofficial Fragrantica News
channel.description: Recent Fragrantica news; titles and links point to the original source.

item.title: Harlem Perfume Co. Releases Sensual Muse: The One They All Had To Paint
item.description: Harlem Perfume Co dreams up the fictional muse that the Harlem Renaissance masters just had to make art about...
item.author: Patric Rhys

item.title: Givenchy L'Interdit Elixir
item.description: Givenchy expands its L'Interdit collection with L'Interdit Elixir, a new Eau de Parfum that introduces a richer, more gourmand interpretation of the signature white floral fragrance.
item.author: Sanja Pekić

item.title: Candy from Strangers: Typical Francesca Bianchi
item.description: Powder, leather, violet caramel, and a provocation on the topic of seducing children
item.author: Sergey Borisov

item.title: Esxence 2026: Yūgen by AVII Perfumes
item.description: Pear lemonade with white flower petals.
item.author: Alena Lavault

item.title: Lullaby Urban Scents: Clean Body and Pure Mind
item.description: A delicate rose, wrapped in white powder, like a rosy-cheeked, plump baby, dusted with talc and swaddled in a snow-white cocoon of cotton after a bath.
item.author: Sergey Borisov

item.title: The Adventures of a Perfume Bottle. Part Two: Facts and Figures
item.description: Let's go back to the 1960s and 70s and talk about packaging and atomizers.
item.author: 1001 Past Tales

item.title: O Boticário Launches Malbec Eau de Parfum
item.description: O Boticário's Icon Reaches Its Highest Concentration.
item.author: Jernê Knowles

item.title: Esxence 2026: Not Only New Releases, But Old Favorites Too
item.description: There is no point in chasing every new releases when older fragrances are just as good.
item.author: Viktoria Vlasova

item.title: Jean Paul Gaultier Launches La Favorite
item.description: Jean Paul Gaultier prepares to launch a fragrance pillar, with new perfume La Favorite.
item.author: Sanja Pekić

item.title: Versace Man Eau Fraîche Extreme
item.description: Dark, boring, vanillic seas
item.author: Eddie Bulliqi

item.title: Aplomb: A New Perfume Brand From Finland
item.description: The brand launches with three scents
item.author: Nicola Thomis

item.title: Matière Première Metal Lavender: The Romance of Provence and Heavy Metal
item.description: A modern lavender. Effortless. Oversized. Comfortable. Easy to wear. A luminous and enveloping trail. Lavender in a new incarnation.
item.author: Matvey Yudov

item.title: 6 Classic Fragrances I Always Revert to in a Heatwave
item.description: There are some fragrances that have proven again and again their ability to cut through the canopy of heat and humidity.
item.author: Elena Vosnaki

item.title: Perfumed Horoscope: July 20-26
item.description: The Mercury retrograde period ends on the 23rd. I’m looking forward to all the corrections and turning my daydream into reality.
item.author: Zoran Cerar

item.title: How Oud Is Born
item.description: Learning to tell agarwood chip grades apart like a true insider.
item.author: Columns

item.title: Nuit Patchouli by La Maison de la Vanille: Three Facets of Patchouli
item.description: From coolness to warmth.
item.author: Elena Prokofeva

item.title: Bel Ami and Bel Ami Vétiver by Hermès: Do Even Geniuses Make Mistakes?
item.description: Comparing the original and the flanker.
item.author: Igor Masyukov

item.title: Ghost Trees Fulton & Roark
item.description: Beautiful California, gray Pacific.
item.author: Elena Knezevic

item.title: Sarah Baker’s Peach Trilogy: A Tale of Three Peaches
item.description: Which peach speaks to you most — carefree, vengeful, or wicked?
item.author: Matvey Yudov

item.title: Blue Incense by Amado and Imagination
item.description: A modern bestseller, Middle Eastern style.
item.author: Igor Masyukov

item.title: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Orchid VS Flora Gorgeous Orchid Intense
item.description: Gelato vs crème brûlée
item.author: Eddie Bulliqi

item.title: Review of Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" (Spoiler alert!)
item.description: Spoiler alert: if you haven't seen the film yet, you probably shouldn't read this.
item.author: Elena Knezevic

item.title: Maison Nomad Noé Launched Habibi Vanilla
item.description: "The emotional intimacy of being so close that connection feels wordless."
item.author: Bella van der Weerd

item.title: The Face of Chanel Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu
item.description: Gracie Abrams, new face of Coco Mademoiselle
item.author: New Fragrances

item.title: The Journey of the Turkish Rose in Perfumery
item.description: The concept of the Turkish Rose in perfumery, the history of the Isparta Rose, its harvest process, and its place in perfumes.
item.author: Sena Toprak

item.title: Fragrance Cloud Plots: A New Way to Experience Perfume
item.description: Presented by Nodus Perfume House, Fragrance Cloud Plots offer a new way of explaining how a perfume evolves over time.
item.author: Giulietta Ptoyan

item.title: New From Swiss Brand BODÉ STUDIOS: Zabianca.
item.description: The scent of early spring on the Amalfi Coast.
item.author: Bella van der Weerd

item.title: The Adventures of a Perfume Bottle. Part One: The Price of Luxury
item.description: The most fascinating, complex, and expensive process was the manufacture of bottles with ground-glass stoppers — and that is what we will discuss today.
item.author: Galina Anni

item.title: How Far Does Our Obsession in Perfumery Go?
item.description: When the trail of a fragrance transforms into obsession and memory.
item.author: Jernê Knowles

item.title: El Morocco Perfumery & Тhe Legendary New York Nightclub
item.description: Five fragrances inspired by café society of NYC from the 1930s through the 1950s.
item.author: New Fragrances

item.title: AEREO Pigmentarium: A Next-Level Skin Scent
item.description: Soft, intimate and quietly addictive, it feels like a warm cloud of comfort – ethereal, grounded and beautifully close to the skin.
item.author: Markéta Rybínová

item.title: A Liquid That Smells
item.description: What turns a smell into perfume?
item.author: Andrei Lensky

item.title: Valentino Beauty Introduces Vendetta Donna and Vendetta Uomo
item.description: More than 30 years after the original Vendetta fragrances debuted in 1991, Valentino returns to the name with a new fragrance duo: Vendetta Donna and Vendetta Uomo.
item.author: Sanja Pekić

item.title: New Book 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝘾𝙪𝙡𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙨 𝙤𝙛 𝙋𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙪𝙢𝙚: 𝙎𝙘𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙨 𝙏𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙎𝙝𝙖𝙥𝙚𝙙 𝙃𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙤𝙧𝙮 by Saskia Wilson-Brown
item.description: A people’s history of perfume – what the art of olfaction can teach us about ourselves and our common humanity. Now available for pre-order.
item.author: Eddie Bulliqi

item.title: Oriflame Launches Two New Creations in the Top Scent Collection: La La Lime and Tropic Thunder
item.description: Summer is here!
item.author: Iulia Halatz

item.title: Giallo Riviera by Arte Profumi: Coolness Takes the Leading Role
item.description: Not particularly sunny — and not quite as citrusy as you might expect...
item.author: Elena Prokofeva

item.title: Carnal Cacao by Maison Tahité: Special Smoky Chilli Chocolate
item.description: With banana, bell pepper, and jungle greens
item.author: Eddie Bulliqi

item.title: Ellis Brooklyn's Summer Escape Isla Sirena
item.description: Fresh notes of coconut water and lime balanced with creamy notes of Blue Java banana, papaya, and vanilla...
item.author: Bella van der Weerd

item.title: Ateliê 55 Candles 24h Collection: A Review
item.description: With every burn, a different, pleasurable revelation.
item.author: Jernê Knowles

item.title: The Fragrances I Usually Wear in Summer in Central Asia
item.description: Shilde is the hottest time of year, when peak solar radiation scorches everything across the steppe and foothills: grass and leaves turn yellowish-brown, while the air smells of dust and dry wormwood.
item.author: Julia Lukyanenko

item.title: Costume National Homme and Scent Intense - Still Smelling Relevant 25 Years Later
item.description: Miguel explores returning to the roots of his niche perfume discoveries.
item.author: Miguel Matos

item.title: Maison Sorbier Parfums
item.description: An olfactory tribute to the world's most opulent textiles.
item.author: Elena Knezevic

item.title: You Might Be Fragrance Obsessed If .... (Yes There's More)
item.description: After collecting and curating a perfume collection for over 14 years, I couldn’t help but think of more habits or idiosyncrasies of perfume lovers.
item.author: Dr Ruqayya Abba Tofa

item.title: Doll by Bel Rebel: Chocolate-Covered, Rum-Filled Apricots
item.description: Another tale of rum and raisin?
item.author: Eddie Bulliqi

item.title: Micodelirio by Nasomatto: Mushrooms, But Not The Ones You Thought
item.description: It won't open your third eye, but it will definitely plunge you into the atmosphere of a mushroom-filled forest.
item.author: Daria Bogdanova

item.title: Takasago bets big on the future of J-Pop in partnership with Handcraft Entertainment
item.description: A new era of fan-driven fragrance.
item.author: Art Books Events

item.title: Her Skin by Perfumers' Journey Review
item.description: What should niche perfume brands from countries without a luxurious history do?
item.author: Sergey Borisov

item.title: Timeless Nomad by Simone Andreoli: The Perfumer’s Personal Memories
item.description: Five emotions captured in bottles.
item.author: Elena Prokofeva

item.title: Midnight Vetiver: A Beautiful Deceiver from Gala Step Parfums
item.description: Continuing our exploration of the Russian brand.
item.author: Sergey Borisov

item.title: Dries Van Noten Presents Velvet Violet
item.description: An unexpected interpretation of violet by Gaël Montero.
item.author: Giulietta Ptoyan

item.title: La Pointe Courte Folia Paris: Fresh, Masculine, Citrusy
item.description: Just add the French New Wave!
item.author: Sergey Borisov

item.title: Expo Chile Inspira 2026 Returns with Its Biggest Edition Yet
item.description: Expo Chile Inspira, Chile’s First International Perfumery Exhibition, Returns for Its Third Edition.
item.author: Nayeli Cano

item.title: Pierre Bonnard Exhibition Featuring Parfums Godet: When Colors and Fragrances Unite
item.description: From June 27 to October 31, 2026, the Musée Bonnard in Le Cannet, France, presents the exhibition "Bonnard Intime: Les Toilettes de Marthe" featuring a unique olfactory accompaniment.
item.author: Sergey Borisov

item.title: The Silent Power of Presence: Ormonde Jayne Launches Suede Silhouette
item.description: Suede Silhouette joins the new collection Four Corners of the Earth Reimagined.
item.author: Dariia Fessalonika

item.title: Wild Narcissus by Aromag: A Living Green Wrapped in Classical Elegance
item.description: Wild Narcissus doesn't simply recreate nature, this quasi-green-soliflore gently elevates it into perfumery without losing its soul.
item.author: Yi Shang (怡 商)

item.title: Polaris Olfactive Week AW26 In Stockholm
item.description: Running this November 27th to 29th
item.author: Eddie Bulliqi

item.title: This is (Not) Teint De Neige by Lorenzo Villoresi
item.description: A comparison of the legendary powdery fragrance and its numerous variations.
item.author: Daria Bogdanova

item.title: Pitti Fragranze 2026: Brands
item.description: The initial list of exhibitors. Stay tuned for more!
item.author: Giulietta Ptoyan

item.title: Bottega Veneta Reveals Its Alta collection
item.description: In June, Bottega Veneta unveiled Alta, a lovely collection of ten perfumes, including Ricordami, one of my next winter signature scents.
item.author: Sophie Normand

item.title: Juliette Has A Gun: The Bold Collection
item.description: Three revamped, unvaulted scents and one new, each with massive sillage, offer wonderful surprises in a line often unsurprising...
item.author: Patric Rhys
